expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md states the run is "Not satisfied (blocked by missing Phase 5b run artifacts)" and explicitly: "does not include any Phase 5b outputs ... Without those artifacts, we cannot verify ... that the plan distinguishes: Supported export formats ... Entry points ... Output expectations." No plan content demonstrating those distinctions is present in the provided output files.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The outputs acknowledge Phase 5b as the target but also document missing required Phase 5b artifacts. execution_notes.md: "Missing Phase 5b run artifacts ... Without these, cannot verify: that Phase 5b was executed, that checkpoints were audited." result.md similarly notes absence of required Phase 5b deliverables (checkpoint audit, checkpoint delta, Phase 5b draft), so the provided run output does not align with/contain the Phase 5b-required artifacts.
